faq.title_html: Do you have questions in mind? Get the answers now
faq.answer1: From initial analysis to implementation, we prioritize quality, reliability and customer satisfaction in every intervention. Make us your trusted partner to achieve your goals.
faq.question2: Will the solution be tailored to my business?
faq.answer2: Absolutely. We design each custom solution based on your company's specific needs, industry sector and strategic objectives.
faq.answer3: We support you through all preparation stages: initial audit, detailed planning, team training and progressive implementation to ensure a smooth transition.
faq.question4: How to choose the right solution?
faq.answer4: Our team of experts analyzes your needs, existing infrastructure and future goals to recommend the most suitable and efficient solution.

blog_details.page_title: Cybersecurity: 5 priority controls for SMBs and mid-sized companies
blog_details.article_title: Cybersecurity: 5 priority controls for SMBs and mid-sized companies
blog_details.article_text1: For SMBs and mid-sized organizations, cybersecurity does not start with stacking more tools. It starts with a few foundational controls that quickly reduce exposure: access visibility, endpoint protection, tested backups and strong configuration hygiene.
blog_details.article_text2: The most resilient organizations first prioritize what reduces frequent incidents: privileged account control, MFA, critical patching, basic segmentation and the ability to recover fast. This approach creates practical security gains without adding unnecessary complexity.
blog_details.quote: "An effective cyber strategy does not begin with more tools. It begins with more visibility, fewer unnecessary privileges and backups that can actually be restored under pressure."
blog_details.subtitle: The 5 controls to prioritize first
blog_details.article_text3: Start by enforcing multi-factor authentication on sensitive access, reviewing administrative rights, maintaining disciplined patching, isolating critical assets and testing backup restoration on a regular basis. These five workstreams create a solid base for a more mature security program.
blog_details.form_notice: By using this form you agree with message storage. You can also contact us directly.
